name: Chris McDaniel
subject: Establishment running fake news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
The establishment in Washington is at it again, now running ads against me that are just patently false. This time it’s the Chamber of Commerce, who spent over $12 million dollars in the 2014 elections backing establishment candidates against their conservative challengers. | | | | [ ](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-r/)
---
Peter,
The establishment in Washington is at it again, now running ads against me that are just patently false.
This time it’s the Chamber of Commerce, who spent over $12 million dollars in the 2014 elections backing establishment candidates against their conservative challengers.
In their new ad, they falsely claim I’m a “trial lawyer” when in fact I am really a defense lawyer. **In fact, my law firm is focused on defending corporate clients from trial lawyers.**
**Because I can’t stand for fake news that is trying to decieve Mississippi voters, I’ve sent a letter to Mississippi television stations demanding that they stop running them.**
Now, we don’t know when these false attacks are going to stop so I’m counting on your help to combat the fake news. The best way is to make sure your family and friends know the truth. Please [forward this email](http://mcdanielforsenate.forwardtomyfriend.com/d-ydllhlurty-DF290457-okdiily-l-m) to help inform them and make sure you are following me on [Facebook](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-y/) and [Twitter](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-j/) so you always know the truth and have the the best information to help fight back against these attacks!
[FACEBOOK](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-i/) | [TWITTER](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-h/)
This race is going to be tough. The establishment is clearly desperate to keep a real conservative like myself out of the Senate.
They know I won’t be their lapdog. Instead I’ll be a bulldog that always fights for Mississippi’s values no matter what.
Help me fight back against this fake news by following our campaign on [Facebook](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-k/) and [Twitter](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-okdiily-ydllhlurty-u/) today.
Remember Mississippi,
Chris

name: Official DNC HQ
subject: We'd like to ask you to renew your commitment today, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
It's critical that we channel our energy toward winning elections up and down the ballot this year. An organization like the DNC won't be able to do that ourselves.
---
Today we want to ask you to do something important, Derek: renew your commitment to electing Democrats.

It can be tough to stay focused these days. We live in a never-ending news cycle where shocking news is always breaking at all hours of the day. But it's critical that we channel our energy toward winning elections up and down the ballot this year. An organization like the DNC won't be able to do that ourselves -- our party will only succeed if we stand together.

**Add your name to say you are committed as ever to electing Democrats in all 50 states this year.**

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
On Wednesday, the governor spent some time visiting with one of
Americas most respected and honorable leaders, Secretary Jim
Baker, prior to speaking at the Baker Institute for Public
Policy's lecture series.

Peter, Gov. Kasich was in Texas
for a couple of days to participate in several events.

On Wednesday, the governor spent
some time visiting with one of America's most respected and
honorable leaders, Secretary Jim Baker, prior to speaking at the
Baker Institute for Public Policy's lecture series. Watch the
full event below:

Barbara Bush spent a lifetime
committed to her family and to promoting literacy. Governor
Kasich was proud to participate in the "Barbara Bush Houston
Literacy Foundation: A Celebration of Reading" event. It was a
memorable event that helped celebrate the First Lady and all that
she stood for.

Additionally, Gov. Kasich was a
special guest and delivered a moving keynote address at the 2018
EarthX Global Gala event in Dallas. He spoke about the void of
American leadership and about how our country must pull together
to tackle the big challenges that are before us and the ones that
will impact future generations of Americans.

Big Jobs News:

In other news, Ohio crossed a
significant milestone with the latest job numbers. March was the
second best month for new business filings in history and the
state unemployment rate is at its lowest point in 17 years!

Since Gov. Kasich took office in
2011, he's balanced the state budget, cut government spending,
cut taxes and worked to diversify Ohio's economy, the private
sector has now created more than half a million new jobs.

Under Gov. Kasich's leadership,
Ohio continues to set an example for other states and the nation
that when we balance our budgets, lower taxes and remove the
regulatory burdens, it leads to job creation.

Don't Miss This:

Speaking of balanced budgets, be
sure to check out Gov. Kasich's op-ed with former Federal Reserve
Chairman Alan Greenspan:

Read More: Houston Chronicle:
America's Debt Time Bomb Has a Short Fuse

Common Sense Gun Laws Make Sense:

Gov. Kasich recently spoke with
WCPO to provide an update about Ohio's bipartisan efforts to pass
legislation implementing the common sense changes that will save
lives without infringing on Second Amendment rights:

April Goal:
Gov. Kasich continues to be a
leading voice calling for civility in our public discourse and
for our leaders to toss politics aside and focus on finding
solutions that improve the lives of Americans.

But we're counting on your
ongoing support to ensure that we have the tools to continue
fighting for this.

Please consider chipping in $10,
$25, $50 or more to help us hit our April fundraising goal.

--

For the latest news and updates,
please be sure to follow Gov. Kasich on social media. Below are
some helpful links.

Instagram: (here)
--
Facebook: (here)
--
Twitter: (here)

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Mayor Pete Buttigieg
subject: a real public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
While serving in Congress in 2007, Joe heard from veterans in the South Bend area that they had to travel way too far to receive health care, so he worked first to study the problem and then to solve |
---

| | Hi there Peter,

**My name is Pete Buttigieg, and I 'm the Mayor of South Bend, Indiana.** When I first ran for office, many of the industries that once powered our city were gone, and they'd taken residents' livelihoods with them. I wanted to bring opportunity back to South Bend, because to me, that's what public service is all about.

**But today, I want to tell you about another public servant hard at work for Indiana: Senator Joe Donnelly.** Joe represented South Bend in Congress before serving in the Senate, and his priorities are the same as mine. Joe has his finger on the pulse of working Hoosiers, and he fights for their interests every day in Washington.

**But Joe 's facing a big threat from out-of-state special interests who don't know Indiana like we do. Will you chip in to help him fight back? >>** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5a8/1234113381/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?express_lane=true&refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5ab/1234113381/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?express_lane=true&refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5aa/1234113381/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?express_lane=true&refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5a5/1234113381/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?express_lane=true&refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5a7/1234113381/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?refcode=20180422.2nd")**
There are countless examples of ways Joe has made a difference for Hoosiers, but I'll focus on the one that made the biggest impact on me.

While serving in Congress in 2007, Joe heard from veterans in the South Bend area that they had to travel way too far to receive health care, so he worked first to study the problem and then to solve it. **His persistence paid off: Last September, Joe was proud to speak at the ribbon cutting of a new VA clinic in St. Joseph County.**

Serving in the Navy, I saw firsthand the sacrifices our men and women in uniform make to defend our country. When people raise their right hand and promise to defend the United States with their lives, they enter into an agreement that we're going to take care of them as well -- so ensuring that veterans have access to health care is about honoring a commitment. **And Joe knows that we have to keep our commitments -- which is why he 's one of the Senate's best champions for Social Security, Medicare, and other programs Hoosiers rely on.**

We could use more leaders like Joe Donnelly -- but before we can get more, we need to re-elect the one we've got. [**Will you contribute to Joe 's re-election campaign so he can continue delivering results for Hoosiers?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5a6/1234113381/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=10")

Thanks, Peter -- together, we can send Joe back to the Senate.

Mayor Pete

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20e8/7377f838/3e75107f/51faa5a0/1234113381/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?refcode=20180422.2nd&amount=25")**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Democrats are taking action to combat climate change. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79abf/2f5ea88d/722f8693/2cbca870/2151959852/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/supportdemocrats/videos/10156076397031346/") Friend, As we celebrate Earth Day 2018, the environmental progress we've made in the United States is rapidly disappearing. Irreparable damage is being done to our water sources, our oceans, our air, and our precious resources. The Trump administration is gutting regulations designed to protect and preserve our environment. And, to make things worse, administration officials are taking away years of scientific research and evidence, replacing them with the distorted views of climate-change deniers. All is not lost, however. There is some good news. [**Democrats in Congress, states like ours, and communities across the country are taking action to combat climate change. Take a few moments to watch our video.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79abf/2f5ea88d/722f8693/2cbca870/2151959852/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/supportdemocrats/videos/10156076397031346/") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79abf/2f5ea88d/722f8693/2cbca870/2151959852/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/supportdemocrats/videos/10156076397031346/") We don't have to just take the constant assaults from this administration on the land we love. In Washington state we are resisting the national attacks on our air and water and charting a better path forward. On this Earth Day, I'll be raising my voice to protest the other Washington's anti-environment agenda. And I'll be re-dedicating myself to doing all I can to protect our public lands, climate, clean water and air, and environment. I hope you'll join me. [**Now, please take a few moments to watch our video. It will inspire you to take action. Then share it with family and friends!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79abf/2f5ea88d/722f8693/2cbca870/2151959852/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/supportdemocrats/videos/10156076397031346/") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SHARE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79abf/2f5ea88d/722f8693/2cbca870/2151959852/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/supportdemocrats/videos/10156076397031346/")
